items.html: *And know: the matter of the making of this Kli [vessel] is that there are then also given to her the upper Mochin in the first three [Sefirot], and they spread through the whole of her, as is known. And then the illumination of those Hassadim, called RIU [216] and Kli, also descends into her Yesod, and a Kli is made there. Thus this Kli is not in the Yesod alone; rather, they are the very Mochin in the entire stature of Aba and Bina, in the entire stature of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and in the entire stature of the Nukva [female]. And from the totality of those five Hassadim it is drawn also into their Yesod. And then the females, Ima and Malchut, receive these Mochin by way of their husbands — the one Panim be Panim [face to face], and the other Achor be Achor [back to back] — and their body is built, and the totality of the Hassadim of the RIU is placed in her in the secret of Achor be Achor, and then she is made a Kli. And afterwards Aba returns to extend the actual inner Mochin of Zivug [coupling], and enters Ima in the secret of Mochin and in the secret of Zivug as well. And from there they are extended to ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] in the secret of the Partzuf itself, and afterwards in the secret of a Zivug. Understand this very well.
